title: How To Watch 'The White Lotus' Season 3 — Premiere Date, Time, and More
text: The White Lotus Season 3 premiered on February 16, 2025, with new episodes airing every Sunday at 9pm ET / 6pm PT. The third season relocates the resort to Thailand, introducing a fresh cast of characters. Season 3 consists of 8 episodes, making it the longest season to date. The finale aired on April 6, 2025. The show streams exclusively on Max, with cable availability on HBO. The season has earned a 92% rating on Rotten Tomatoes, positioning it among the best-reviewed television seasons of 2025. The ensemble cast includes Walton Goggins, Natasha Rothwell, Parker Posey, Jason Isaacs, Michelle Monaghan, Carrie Coon, Leslie Bibb, and Aimee Lou Wood. If you have neither an HBO nor Max subscription, you will not be able to watch The White Lotus Season 3.
